SELECT

    COUNT(*) AS num_students
FROM 
    students

gold_sql: SELECT major, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students GROUP BY major ORDER BY major;

generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.course_code, 
    c.course_name, 
    AVG(g.score) AS avg_score
FROM 
    courses c
LEFT JOIN 
    grades g ON c.course_id = g.course_id
GROUP BY 
    c.course_code, 
    c.course_name;
gold_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 2) AS average_score FROM grades g JOIN courses c ON g.course_id = c.course_id GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name ORDER BY c.course_code;

generated_sql:
SELECT s.full_name, AVG(g.score) AS avg_score
FROM grades g
JOIN students s ON g.student_id = s.student_id
GROUP BY s.full_name
ORDER BY avg_score DESC
LIMIT 5;
gold_sql: SELECT s.full_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 2) AS average_score FROM students s JOIN grades g ON s.student_id = g.student_id GROUP BY s.student_id, s.full_name ORDER BY average_score DESC, s.full_name LIMIT 5;

generated_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LOWER(grade) LIKE 'a%' THEN 'HD'
        WHEN LOWER(grade) LIKE 'b%' THEN 'P'
        ELSE grade
    END AS grade_band, 
    COUNT(*) AS num_grades
FROM grades
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN LOWER(grade) LIKE 'a%' THEN 'HD'
        WHEN LOWER(grade) LIKE 'b%' THEN 'P'
        ELSE grade
    END;
gold_sql: SELECT grade, COUNT(*) AS grade_count FROM grades GROUP BY grade ORDER BY grade;

retrieved_tables: customer_support_tickets, customers, marketing_campaigns, order_items, orders, regions, returns, stores
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    r.region_name, 
    SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
    order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN 
    regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id
WHERE 
    o.order_status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY 
    r.region_name;
gold_sql: SELECT r.region_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount_pct)), 2) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_status = 'Completed' GROUP BY r.region_name ORDER BY revenue DESC;

retrieved_tables: customer_support_tickets, customers, inventory_snapshots, marketing_campaigns, order_items, orders, products, returns, stores, suppliers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    category, 
    SUM(unit_price * quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    products 
JOIN 
    order_items ON products.product_id = order_items.product_id
JOIN 
    orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id
WHERE 
    orders.order_status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY 
    category
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount_pct)), 2) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_status = 'Completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC;

retrieved_tables: appointments, doctors, hospitals, patients, prescriptions, treatments
generated_sql:
SELECT 
  h.city, AVG(t.cost) AS avg_treatment_cost
FROM 
  treatments t
  JOIN hospitals h ON h.hospital_id IN (
    SELECT hospital_id FROM appointments a
    JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.city = h.city
    JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
  )
GROUP BY 
  h.city;
gold_sql: SELECT h.city, ROUND(AVG(t.cost), 2) AS average_treatment_cost FROM treatments t JOIN appointments a ON t.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id JOIN hospitals h ON d.hospital_id = h.hospital_id GROUP BY h.city ORDER BY average_treatment_cost DESC;

gold_sql: SELECT d.specialty, COUNT(*) AS completed_appointments FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE a.status = 'Completed' GROUP BY d.specialty ORDER BY completed_appointments DESC, d.specialty;
